/** * @fileoverview Rule to restrict what can be thrown as an exception. * @author Dieter Oberkofler */ "use strict"; const astUtils = require("./utils/ast-utils"); //------------------------------------------------------------------------------ // Rule Definition //------------------------------------------------------------------------------ /** @type {import('../types').Rule.RuleModule} */ module.exports = { meta: { type: "suggestion", docs: { description: "Disallow throwing literals as exceptions", recommended: false, url: "https://eslint.org/docs/latest/rules/no-throw-literal", }, schema: [], messages: { object: "Expected an error object to be thrown.", undef: "Do not throw undefined.", }, }, create(context) { return { ThrowStatement(node) { if (!astUtils.couldBeError(node.argument)) { context.report({ node, messageId: "object" }); } else if (node.argument.type === "Identifier") { if (node.argument.name === "undefined") { context.report({ node, messageId: "undef" }); } } }, }; }, };
